bundle.longDescription: Pick a nation and conquer the world. Domination is a turn-based world conquest simulator with AI diplomacy, economy, and 250+ nations.

updater._comment_pubkey: TAURI 2 UPDATER PUBLIC KEY (key ID 25319536ux5C1F4A73). Baked into v1.0.2+ clients at compile time; runtime updater verifies latest.json signatures against the matching private key which lives ONLY at ~/.tauri/keys/keypair.key on your local dev machine (NOT in any repo, NOT in any cloud secret). To rotate: `cargo tauri signer generate -w ~/.tauri/keys/keypair.key` locally, paste the new PUBLIC line here, then back up the new PRIVATE file + its password somewhere safe (1Password or encrypted vault). Rotation breaks verification for older client releases; bump the version alongside.
updater._comment_endpoints: Tauri's updater host: GitHub Releases. The client tries each URL in order, dropping any that 404/parse-fail. The first URL is the 'latest release' pointer (always tracks whatever is most recently published as a non-prerelease tag). The second URL is the per-tag pointer (matches THIS client binary's version) - v1.0.2 here means clients built from v1.0.2 fetch the v1.0.2 manifest from here as a fallback if the latest pointer is stale or down. To bump: change `version` in this file (and the second URL's /vX.Y.Z/ segment) - `node scripts/release-version.mjs <X.Y.Z>` keeps them in sync. Releases are produced by `npm run release:local` (a local-build script on your dev machine) - there is NO CI; you upload artifacts to GitHub Releases manually via the web UI.
